site.name: OME Advisory
site.hero_tagline: OME Advisory delivers rigorous, evidence-based ESG strategy, regulatory compliance, and carbon market intelligence — built by practitioners who have led from the inside.

ISO Services.label: ISO Prep Audit
ISO Services.intro: Entry-point engagements for companies at the start of their compliance or certification journey. High-certainty mandates, rapid deployment.

items.title: ISO 14001 Certification Prep Audit
items.scope: 2–4 day gap assessment, written report, corrective action plan. Prepare for first certification or renewal against ISO 14001 EMS standard.
items.target: SMEs seeking first certification; companies renewing

items.title: GHG Verification based on ISO 14064-3
items.scope: Third-party verification of corporate GHG inventory to ISO 14064-3 standard. Supports CSRD disclosure and investor-grade data assurance.
items.target: Companies needing verified GHG data for CSRD or investor disclosure

items.title: ISO 50001 Certification Prep Audit
items.scope: 2–3 day energy management gap assessment against ISO 50001 EnMS standard. Covers energy review, baseline establishment, performance indicators, objectives and targets, and corrective action plan for certification readiness.
items.target: Energy-intensive manufacturers, industrial facilities, and large commercial buildings seeking first ISO 50001 certification or renewal

Sustainability Services.label: Sustainability & Climate
Sustainability Services.badge: GHG · CSRD · EU Taxonomy · CSDDD · ESG Ratings
Sustainability Services.intro: Strategic sustainability mandates covering GHG accounting, regulatory compliance, ESG ratings improvement, and retained advisory. Technically intensive, high-impact engagements.

items.title: GHG Scope 3 Inventory
items.scope: Full Scope 3 category mapping, data collection protocol, inventory build and validation. FLAG emission categories addressed for food and agri sectors.
items.target: Mid-market manufacturers; food/agri companies with FLAG exposure

items.title: SBTi Target Setting
items.scope: Pathway selection, FLAG/non-FLAG split, target calculation, and SBTi submission support. Full alignment with SBTi Corporate Standard and FLAG Guidance v1.2.
items.target: Companies with >50% FLAG emissions; food, packaging, chemicals, forestry

items.title: LkSG Compliance Programme
items.scope: Risk analysis, policy development, grievance mechanism design, and first annual report. Full compliance architecture for German Supply Chain Act obligations.
items.target: German companies with 1,000 or more employees; supply chain of large clients

items.title: CSDDD Implementation
items.scope: Value chain due diligence framework, supplier risk tiering, remediation protocols. Preparation for the 2027 CSDDD transposition under Directive 2024/1760.
items.target: Large German/EU companies preparing for 2027 transposition

items.title: ESG Ratings Advisory
items.scope: MSCI, Sustainalytics, and CDP score analysis; disclosure gap identification; improvement roadmap. Methodology-level insight from former ratings practitioners.
items.target: Listed companies; PE-backed companies pre-IPO or fundraising

items.title: EU Taxonomy Alignment
items.scope: Technical Screening Criteria mapping, DNSH assessment, Minimum Social Safeguards review. Full eligibility and alignment analysis for disclosure and financing purposes.
items.target: Financial institutions (SFDR); infrastructure companies; real assets

items.title: Retained ESG Advisor
items.scope: Monthly retainer: board-level ESG strategy, regulator horizon scanning, peer benchmarking, ad hoc support. Your most stable and continuous advisory relationship.
items.target: Mid-large corporates seeking continuous strategic ESG counsel

Carbon Market Services.label: Carbon Market
Carbon Market Services.intro: Specialised carbon market advisory grounded in direct UNFCCC Secretariat experience. From Paris Agreement Article 6 navigation to full decarbonisation roadmaps — the most differentiated service line in the portfolio.

items.title: Article 6 / Carbon Market Strategy
items.scope: Paris Agreement Art. 6.2/6.4 advisory; host country agreement navigation; ITMOs strategy. Advisory grounded in direct UNFCCC secretariat experience from rule-making to implementation.
items.target: Energy/utility companies; carbon project developers; government agencies

items.title: Decarbonisation Roadmap
items.scope: Technology pathway analysis, CAPEX/OPEX modelling, carbon abatement curves, 2030/2050 targets. Sector-calibrated for chemicals, cement, and steel.
items.target: Industrial manufacturers; energy-intensive sectors (chemicals, cement, steel)

Training.label: Training
Training.intro: Practical, management-level training on CSRD, LkSG, ISO 14064, and carbon markets. Delivered in-house or through industry associations. Tailored to sector, regulatory context, and audience seniority.

items.title: CSRD & ESRS Reporting Workshop
items.scope: Half or full-day workshop covering CSRD scope, double materiality, ESRS disclosure requirements, and reporting roadmap. Practical exercises with sector-specific examples.
items.target: Sustainability teams, CFO offices, board members facing FY2025 reporting deadline

items.title: LkSG Supply Chain Due Diligence Workshop
items.scope: Full-day training on German Supply Chain Act obligations, risk analysis methodology, grievance mechanisms, and annual reporting requirements.
items.target: Procurement, legal, and sustainability teams at companies with 1,000+ employees

items.title: GHG Accounting & ISO 14064 Workshop
items.scope: Half or full-day workshop on GHG Protocol methodology, Scope 1/2/3 accounting, verification requirements under ISO 14064-3, and CSRD alignment.
items.target: Corporate sustainability and finance teams; operations managers

items.title: Carbon Markets & Article 6 Workshop
items.scope: Full-day workshop on voluntary and compliance carbon markets, Paris Agreement Article 6 mechanics, ITMOs, carbon credit quality, and corporate offsetting strategy.
items.target: Industry associations; chambers of commerce (IHK Hamburg); corporate strategy teams
